#144 Stranded at night on Jeju Island, Korea

Areas discussed: Jeju South Korea, Hamdeok Beach, Seongsan Ilchulbong Marine Provincial Park, Chicken Point, Sinpung-ri Hadong, Pyoseon Beach

July 16, 2025 2 hours 6 minutes Jeju Island, South Korea

All transcripts are machine generated.

Transcript

Alright, this is a rare two-parter episode of this podcast, so last episode, I did, you know, got a little further on my circumnavigation of Jeju and had some adventures and some stuff happened, you know, see last episode for details, was already a pretty interesting day, a lot more stuff happened than usual.
